indexes.expression: create unique index "questionnaire_type_code_unique" on "questionnaire_type" ("code") where "deleted_at" is null
create index "report_job_batch_id_index" on "report_job" ("batch_id") where batch_id is not null
create unique index "uq_report_job_pending" on "report_job" ("faculty_id", "semester_id", "questionnaire_type_code", "report_type") where status in ('waiting', 'active') and deleted_at is null
create unique index "submission_embedding_submission_id_unique" on "submission_embedding" ("submission_id") where "deleted_at" is null

options.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND course_id IS NULL
deleted_at IS NULL AND course_id IS NOT NULL

indexes.expression: create unique index "topic_assignment_topic_id_submission_id_unique" on "topic_assignment" ("topic_id", "submission_id") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "sentiment_result_run_id_submission_id_unique" on "sentiment_result" ("run_id", "submission_id") where "deleted_at" is null
create index "idx_sr_submission_processed" on "sentiment_result" ("submission_id", "processed_at" desc) where "deleted_at" is null
